text.title: google-shopping-ads Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-shopping-ads as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating feed upload as synchronous — checking product status immediately after upload.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Feed upload is async; productstatuses.get reflects the state before the upload for up to 30 minutes after insertion. Agents checking status immediately after upload will see stale disapprovals.
